[DEBUG] Bash tool invoked with command: python3 -c "
import re

# Read the file
with open('/home/user/Desktop/ava-asterisk-config/conf/extensions.conf', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Pattern to find AudioSocket lines followed by Hangup without StopMonitor
pattern = r'( same => n,AudioSocket\(\$\{AUDIOSOCKET_UUID\},avr-bot-\d+:\d+\))\n( same => n,Hangup\(\))'

# Replace with AudioSocket, StopMonitor, then Hangup
replacement = r'\1\n same => n,StopMonitor()\n\2'

# Apply replacement
new_content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content)

# Write back
with open('/home/user/Desktop/ava-asterisk-config/conf/extensions.conf', 'w') as f:
    f.write(new_content)

print('Fixed all bot extensions with StopMonitor')
"

import sqlite3

cursor = conn.cursor()

rows = cursor.fetchall()

conn.close()

import re

# Read the file
with open('/home/user/Desktop/ava-asterisk-config/conf/extensions.conf', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Remove Monitor lines
content = re.sub(r' same => n,Monitor\(.*?\)\n', '', content)

# Remove StopMonitor lines  
content = re.sub(r' same => n,StopMonitor\(\)\n', '', content)

# Write back
with open('/home/user/Desktop/ava-asterisk-config/conf/extensions.conf', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('✅ Removed all Monitor/StopMonitor lines')
"

import os
import requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

api_key = os.getenv('GROQ_API_KEY')
response = requests.post(
    'https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
    json={
        'model': 'openai/gpt-oss-20b',
        'messages': [
            {'role': 'system', 'content': 'You are Ava from Fund Express. Stay in character.'},
            {'role': 'user', 'content': 'Did you get the funding?'}
        ],
        'max_tokens': 50,
        'temperature': 0.1
    },
    timeout=10
)

if response.status_code == 200:
    print('✅ GPT-20B is WORKING!')
    data = response.json()
    print(f\"Response: {data['choices'][0]['message']['content']}\")
else:
    print(f'❌ Status: {response.status_code}')
    print(f'Error: {response.text[:200]}')
"
